_meta.description: Session replay configuration for FFE Social Engine. Defines URL patterns, masking rules, sample rates, and cohort targeting for PostHog session replay.
_meta.implementation_note: Apply these settings via posthog-js initialization in apps/dashboard/src/lib/posthog.ts. Some settings (masking, sample rates) are SDK-side; URL filtering and cohort targeting are configured in PostHog project settings.

url_patterns.description: Full onboarding wizard — 4 steps from connect accounts to scheduling
url_patterns.rationale: Highest value flow for product team — understand wizard drop-off
Every drop-off here is direct revenue loss — record all sessions
Intent signal — users on pricing page are evaluating conversion
20% general sampling for feature adoption and bug discovery

mask_inputs.description: Any element explicitly marked to not be captured

masking.privacy_note: Stripe Elements are rendered in iframes and are automatically excluded from replay. No raw card data is ever captured.

cohort_targeting.description: Use PostHog feature flags linked to cohorts to control which users receive session replay

rules.rationale: Full recording for all trial users — highest conversion optimization value
Understand why at-risk users stopped engaging — look for frustration signals
Light sampling of power users for feature usage patterns

feature_flags.description: Link these feature flags to cohorts in PostHog to conditionally enable replay features

flags.description: Enable enhanced session replay for users going through onboarding
Enable enhanced session replay for checkout flows

posthog_js_config.description: Configuration object to pass to posthog.init() in apps/dashboard/src/lib/posthog.ts

config._note: URL-based sample rates cannot be set directly in posthog.init. Implement via posthog.startSessionRecording() called conditionally based on current pathname.
